meta.focus_summary_text:
🔥 Weekly AP Quant Radar — Technical Focus List

[AP-Clock]:
• $PPC 162/180 (rem 18d)

[ 📉 BREAKDOWNS (Below 200-SMA) ]
• $WLDN | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -17.2% | Vol 1.3x | Willdan Group (WLDN) Q4 earnings beat estimates
• $UBER | NEWS+BD200 | -16.4% | Vol 0.7x | Zoox and Uber Announce Strategic Partnership
• $CVSA | NEWS+BD200 | -12.1% | Vol 1.2x | Director reported March insider share purchases in Form 4
• $OKTA | NEWS+BD200 | -12.1% | Vol 0.5x | Okta announces fourth quarter and fiscal year 2026 financial results
• $APP | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -10.7% | Vol 0.6x | No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
• $SKYW | NEWS+BD200 | -13.9% | Vol 1.2x | No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found

[ 🚀 STRENGTH (Above 200-SMA) ]
• $POWL | NEWS+X200 | +53.3% | Vol 0.8x | No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
• $AGX | NEWS+X200 | +55.5% | Vol 0.7x | ER in 13d

🎯 Triggers: OKTA > 79.07 (EMA21) | APP > 461.25 (EMA21) | UBER > 74.54 (EMA21)

focus_view_model.news_headline: Willdan Group (WLDN) Q4 earnings beat estimates
focus_view_model.news_summary: Willdan reported Q4 EPS of 1.57 versus a 0.79 consensus estimate, but the stock still closed far below SMA200, EMA55, and EMA21.

logic_pillars.technical: LatestPrice 79.49 remains below SMA200 95.95, below EMA55 104.71, and below EMA21 95.15, confirming a damaged DOWNTREND structure.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 of 1.25 is meaningfully elevated and indicates stronger-than-normal participation around the breakdown.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: A positive earnings surprise is present, but price has not confirmed it, creating a clean divergence setup.

divergence.note: SA Overall is Buy and earnings were positive, yet price remains materially below SMA200, EMA55, and EMA21.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Wait for daily close above EMA21 (95.15) before reassessing repair potential.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Willdan Group (WLDN) Q4 earnings beat estimates · 7d · 1 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Zoox and Uber Announce Strategic Partnership
focus_view_model.news_summary: Uber announced a new strategic robotaxi partnership with Zoox, but the stock remains below SMA200 and EMA55.

logic_pillars.technical: LatestPrice 73.34 is below SMA200 87.76, below EMA55 77.86, and only slightly below EMA21 74.54, making this an early repair watch rather than a confirmed reversal.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 of 0.70 is weak and does not confirm strong institutional follow-through.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: A fresh company-specific catalyst exists, which materially raises urgency because the technical picture is still broken.

divergence.note: Positive external catalyst contrasts with a price structure still below SMA200 and EMA55.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Watch for daily close above EMA21 (74.54) and then EMA55 (77.86) before adding.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Zoox and Uber Announce Strategic Partnership · 2d · 1 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Director reported March insider share purchases in Form 4
focus_view_model.news_summary: A director disclosed open-market share purchases on March 10 and 11, while price is testing EMA55 and holding above EMA21.

logic_pillars.technical: LatestPrice 103.84 is below SMA200 118.16, nearly flat versus EMA55 103.96, and above EMA21 101.32, which makes this a genuine repair attempt inside a broader breakdown bucket.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 of 1.21 is elevated and supports the importance of the current EMA55 decision zone.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: Fresh insider buying is a positive company-specific signal, but it has not yet translated into a full trend repair above SMA200.

divergence.note: SA Overall is Buy and insider activity is constructive, yet price remains below SMA200.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Watch for decisive reclaim and hold above EMA55 (103.96); below SMA200 (118.16) keeps it tactical only.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Director reported March insider share purchases in Form 4 · 4d · 1 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Okta announces fourth quarter and fiscal year 2026 financial results
focus_view_model.news_summary: Okta reported double-digit revenue growth and highlighted AI-related demand, but the stock has not reclaimed EMA55 or SMA200.

logic_pillars.technical: LatestPrice 79.16 is below SMA200 90.07, below EMA55 82.54, and almost exactly on EMA21 79.07, placing the stock at a fragile short-term inflection.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 of 0.53 is low and reduces confidence in a durable upside breakout.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: Positive official earnings news exists, but the technical response remains muted.

divergence.note: Positive official earnings message contrasts with a price structure still below SMA200 and EMA55.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Wait for daily close above EMA55 (82.54) before treating the EMA21 (79.07) reclaim as durable.

logic_pillars.news_catalyst: No qualifying fresh catalyst was found, so urgency comes from the conflict between Buy rating and broken structure.

divergence.note: SA Overall is Buy while price remains below SMA200 and EMA55.
